economic_notes: Health and Administrative building under construction ($2,958,787 WIP), Hybrid Solar Plant under construction ($1,503,536 WIP), six new houses under construction ($531,401 WIP). Subsequent events: Nation paid $150,000 on behalf of Echo Bay Ltd. for land lease and $560,000 for two parcels of land on Gilford Island after year end.
notes: Audit is qualified due to inability to obtain sufficient audit evidence for investments in T'Se'Kame' Forestry Limited Partnership, T'Se'Kame' Forestry Ltd., Echo Bay Development Ltd., Musgamagw Dzawada'enuxw Fisheries Group LP and Musgamagw Dzawada'enuxw Fisheries Group GP Ltd. (total $919,050). Financial statements are for year ended March 31, 2022 but were signed June 5, 2024 — a significant two-year delay. Accumulated surplus per Note 10 ($13,994,415) differs from Statement of Accumulated Surplus ($14,121,034) — likely a reconciliation discrepancy in the notes. Five GBEs accounted for under modified equity method. expenses_salaries_total taken from Schedule of Expenses by Object; segment disclosure shows $402,834 salaries. total_government_transfers includes ISC $2,673,372 + Government of Canada $766,135 + Province of BC $362,500 + FNHA $891,466 = $4,693,473; BC Gaming LP treated as portfolio investment/other revenue.
